item.title: Lost to Light (2026)
item.description:
Country: Thailand

Total Episodes: 10

Next Episode: 1 of 10 Jun 20, 2026

Disband the group?! No way!!! Once an idol group with dreams of stardom, they’re now forced to wear mascots and sing children’s songs for kindergarten kids. Humiliating? Absolutely. Everyone quits. Everyone—except Jeng, the only one who stays beside Boss Sithian.

“I hereby announce—we are recruiting new members!” The new lineup? Main rapper—now helping his dad drive a long-tail boat and his mom sell goods from a pickup truck; main dancer—a former national cover dance champion once representing Thailand in Korea… and now teaching aerobics to grandmas; main vocal—a rescue volunteer who sings to calm people about to jump off buildings.

Then comes the boss’s brutal condition. If you don’t want the group to disband, take this guy on. The artsy guitarist with the boiled-face look—Mai? The annoying guy from the bar last night?! No way! What Jeng doesn’t know… Mai is actually the younger brother of the label’s chairman—and he joins the group with one secret mission: to win Jeng’s heart.

Meanwhile, Boss Sithian must confront his past and ask for help from Bailiu, his high-school ex, now the CEO of a wildly successful music label. Can Bailiu save Ultimate Wolf, a label on the brink of collapse? Will Jeng finally rise to the light—or fall into complete failure?

(Source: UltimateTroop official YouTube)

View on MyDramaList
item.content:encoded:
Country: Thailand

Total Episodes: 10

Next Episode: 1 of 10 Jun 20, 2026

Disband the group?! No way!!! Once an idol group with dreams of stardom, they’re now forced to wear mascots and sing children’s songs for kindergarten kids. Humiliating? Absolutely. Everyone quits. Everyone—except Jeng, the only one who stays beside Boss Sithian.

“I hereby announce—we are recruiting new members!” The new lineup? Main rapper—now helping his dad drive a long-tail boat and his mom sell goods from a pickup truck; main dancer—a former national cover dance champion once representing Thailand in Korea… and now teaching aerobics to grandmas; main vocal—a rescue volunteer who sings to calm people about to jump off buildings.

Then comes the boss’s brutal condition. If you don’t want the group to disband, take this guy on. The artsy guitarist with the boiled-face look—Mai? The annoying guy from the bar last night?! No way! What Jeng doesn’t know… Mai is actually the younger brother of the label’s chairman—and he joins the group with one secret mission: to win Jeng’s heart.

Meanwhile, Boss Sithian must confront his past and ask for help from Bailiu, his high-school ex, now the CEO of a wildly successful music label. Can Bailiu save Ultimate Wolf, a label on the brink of collapse? Will Jeng finally rise to the light—or fall into complete failure?

(Source: UltimateTroop official YouTube)

View on MyDramaList

item.title: Yatara Yarashii Fukami-kun (2026)
item.description:
Country: Japan

Total Episodes: 10

Next Episode: 8 of 10 May 25, 2026

When secretly judgmental sales ace Kaji discovers the unexpected charm of his seemingly dull colleague Fukami during an overnight trip, their shared views on love ignite a passionate casual arrangement that slowly blossoms into a genuine romance.

(Source: TMDb)

~~ Adapted from the manga series "Yatara Yarashii Fukami-kun." (やたらやらしい深見くん) by Matsumoto Ayaka (松本あやか).

View on MyDramaList

~~ Adapted from the manga series "Yatara Yarashii Fukami-kun." (やたらやらしい深見くん) by Matsumoto Ayaka (松本あやか).

View on MyDramaList

item.title: Seoul Trip (2026)
item.description:
Country: South Korea

Total Episodes: 6

Next Episode: 6 of 6 May 24, 2026

On the first day of my trip to Seoul, I chased down a man I mistook for a pickpocket, only to end up spending the night with him. To my horror, I later found my wallet tucked safely in my bag—and discovered he was actually waiting for an "outcall service." The moment I’m forced to pay my debt with my body instead of cash, a disastrous misunderstanding spirals into a dangerous Seoul affair.

(Source: TMDb)

View on MyDramaList
item.content:encoded:
Country: South Korea

Total Episodes: 6

Next Episode: 6 of 6 May 24, 2026

To my horror, I later found my wallet tucked safely in my bag—and discovered he was actually waiting for an "outcall service." The moment I’m forced to pay my debt with my body instead of cash, a disastrous misunderstanding spirals into a dangerous Seoul affair.

(Source: TMDb)

View on MyDramaList

item.title: Crazy Love, Moo-Moo! (2026)
item.description:
Country: Thailand

Total Episodes: 10

Next Episode: 3 of 10 May 23, 2026

When Hia Fu, the eldest son of a Chinese-Thai family in Kanchanaburi and a full-on hopeless romantic, finds himself trying to win over his younger brother's friend Moo—who clearly states he's not into fair-skinned Chinese guys like him—things are bound to get complicated.

The chaos begins when the two unexpectedly match on a dating DP without realising who the other person is. From rivals to lovers, their relationship turns into one filled with intense jealousy and undeniable chemistry—yet neither is willing to admit their true feelings.

(Source: Viu)

~~ Adapted from the web novel "Phi Fak Chop Thoe Mu" (พี่ฟากชอบเธอมู่) by Littleskyofme.

View on MyDramaList

The chaos begins when the two unexpectedly match on a dating DP without realising who the other person is. From rivals to lovers, their relationship turns into one filled with intense jealousy and undeniable chemistry—yet neither is willing to admit their true feelings.

(Source: Viu)

~~ Adapted from the web novel "Phi Fak Chop Thoe Mu" (พี่ฟากชอบเธอมู่) by Littleskyofme.

View on MyDramaList

item.title: Love upon a Time (2026)
item.description:
Country: Thailand

Total Episodes: 12

Next Episode: 9 of 12 May 22, 2026

Nakhun is an unsuperstitious twenty-year-old student. One day, fate plays a trick on him and he winds up travelling back nearly four hundred years to the Ayutthaya Kingdom. He's mistaken for someone who had gone missing, so Nakhun assumes the identity of Klao and tries to work out the mystery of his disappearance while searching for a way back to his time period.

Klao's friend Phop doesn't believe that Nakhun is the younger brother he knew and keeps an eye trained on him.

(Source: Thai = se-ed.com || Translation = MyDramaList)

~~ Adapted from the novel "Love Upon a Time" (ภพเธอ) by littlebbear96.

View on MyDramaList
item.content:encoded:
Country: Thailand

Total Episodes: 12

Next Episode: 9 of 12 May 22, 2026

Nakhun is an unsuperstitious twenty-year-old student. One day, fate plays a trick on him and he winds up travelling back nearly four hundred years to the Ayutthaya Kingdom. He's mistaken for someone who had gone missing, so Nakhun assumes the identity of Klao and tries to work out the mystery of his disappearance while searching for a way back to his time period.

Klao's friend Phop doesn't believe that Nakhun is the younger brother he knew and keeps an eye trained on him.

(Source: Thai = se-ed.com || Translation = MyDramaList)

~~ Adapted from the novel "Love Upon a Time" (ภพเธอ) by littlebbear96.

View on MyDramaList

item.title: Check in to You (2026)
item.description:
Country: South Korea

Total Episodes: 6

Next Episode: 1 of 6 May 21, 2026

The story follows the chaotic body-swapping journey of two men from 180-degree different worlds who accidentally switch bodies after an unexpected incident. A ‘cold-hearted perfectionist’ who used to push everyone away, and a ‘warm-hearted romanticist’ who was always kind to others. Like oil and water, they never seemed meant to mix. But as they are forced to live each other's lives, they begin to understand their hidden scars, bickering until they unexpectedly find themselves falling deeply for one another.

(Source: Strongberry.kr)

View on MyDramaList
item.content:encoded:
Country: South Korea

Total Episodes: 6

Next Episode: 1 of 6 May 21, 2026

The story follows the chaotic body-swapping journey of two men from 180-degree different worlds who accidentally switch bodies after an unexpected incident. A ‘cold-hearted perfectionist’ who used to push everyone away, and a ‘warm-hearted romanticist’ who was always kind to others. Like oil and water, they never seemed meant to mix. But as they are forced to live each other's lives, they begin to understand their hidden scars, bickering until they unexpectedly find themselves falling deeply for one another.

(Source: Strongberry.kr)

View on MyDramaList

item.title: Wishing upon the Shooting Stars (2026)
item.description:
Country: Taiwan

Total Episodes: 12

Next Episode: 10 of 12 May 21, 2026

After getting laid off, timid office worker Xiang Yong returns to his hometown from Taipei and makes a wish not to be recognized, only to have it mysteriously come true. Mistaken for a stranger and kicked out by his father, he’s stunned to find the new B&B staff is his high school crush, Hao Wei. As a summer meteor shower approaches, the two reconnect, and Xiang Yong is forced to confront his true desires in a whimsical tale of healing and rediscovery.

(Source: MyDramaList)

~~ Adapted from the novel "Kuan Kan Liu Hsing Te Cheng Chueh Fang Shih" (觀看流星的正確方式) by Chung Min Jui (鍾旻瑞).

View on MyDramaList
item.content:encoded:
Country: Taiwan

Total Episodes: 12

Next Episode: 10 of 12 May 21, 2026

After getting laid off, timid office worker Xiang Yong returns to his hometown from Taipei and makes a wish not to be recognized, only to have it mysteriously come true. Mistaken for a stranger and kicked out by his father, he’s stunned to find the new B&B staff is his high school crush, Hao Wei. As a summer meteor shower approaches, the two reconnect, and Xiang Yong is forced to confront his true desires in a whimsical tale of healing and rediscovery.

~~ Adapted from the novel "Kuan Kan Liu Hsing Te Cheng Chueh Fang Shih" (觀看流星的正確方式) by Chung Min Jui (鍾旻瑞).

View on MyDramaList

item.title: Love You Teacher (2026)
item.description:
Country: Thailand

Total Episodes: 10

Elementary school teacher Pobmek doesn't like kids, but his boyfriend Teacher Solar does, and he likes Solar more than enough to make up for it. When he suffers an accident, however, Solar is left with brain damage, reverting mentally at times to the age of seven. After he takes "Nong Sun" back home, there are days when Pobmek doesn't get any respite from children.

(Source: MyDramaList)

View on MyDramaList
item.content:encoded:
Country: Thailand

Total Episodes: 10

Elementary school teacher Pobmek doesn't like kids, but his boyfriend Teacher Solar does, and he likes Solar more than enough to make up for it. When he suffers an accident, however, Solar is left with brain damage, reverting mentally at times to the age of seven. After he takes "Nong Sun" back home, there are days when Pobmek doesn't get any respite from children.

(Source: MyDramaList)

View on MyDramaList

item.title: Sweet Blood (2026)
item.description:
Country: South Korea

Total Episodes: 8

On the night of a blue moon lunar eclipse that happens once in ten years, the portal between the vampire world, where drinking human blood is forbidden, and the human world opens. Lucifer, a vampire prince who desperately craves human blood, descends into the human world. Min U, a university student in his early twenties, moves to the city from the countryside. He works tirelessly, day and night, to save up for tuition while also studying hard.

However, Min U contracts a rare disease that puts his life at risk whenever he bleeds. One day, Min U becomes a victim of a hit-and-run accident, bleeding and finding himself in a life-threatening situation. Lucifer, drawn by the scent of blood, attacks Min U. However, something strange happens: Lucifer collapses, and Min U miraculously survives, unharmed.

(Source: Korean = plfil.com || Translation = MyDramaList)

View on MyDramaList
item.content:encoded:
Country: South Korea

Total Episodes: 8

On the night of a blue moon lunar eclipse that happens once in ten years, the portal between the vampire world, where drinking human blood is forbidden, and the human world opens. Lucifer, a vampire prince who desperately craves human blood, descends into the human world. Min U, a university student in his early twenties, moves to the city from the countryside. He works tirelessly, day and night, to save up for tuition while also studying hard.

However, Min U contracts a rare disease that puts his life at risk whenever he bleeds. One day, Min U becomes a victim of a hit-and-run accident, bleeding and finding himself in a life-threatening situation. Lucifer, drawn by the scent of blood, attacks Min U. However, something strange happens: Lucifer collapses, and Min U miraculously survives, unharmed.

(Source: Korean = plfil.com || Translation = MyDramaList)

View on MyDramaList

item.title: Laundry Romance (2026)
item.description:
Country: South Korea

Total Episodes: 4

Life, like clothes, sometimes gets wrinkled and shriveled.

Jae Min, a 30-year-old job seeker who lives with anxiety that clings to him like grime, and Ji Seok, a 34-year-old voluntary unemployed person who threw away his well-ironed shirt and chose to stop. A healing romance between two men that blends in with the noise of the washing machines running late at night at a coin laundromat.

(Source: Korean = filmmakers.co.kr || Translation = MyDramaList)

View on MyDramaList

A healing romance between two men that blends in with the noise of the washing machines running late at night at a coin laundromat.

View on MyDramaList

item.title: Between Doors (2026)
item.description:
Country: South Korea

Total Episodes: 6

Yun Jae accidentally enters Do Hyeon’s apartment while drunk, and their first meeting begins with an unexpected kiss. Afterward, they keep running into each other in the same apartment complex and gradually grow closer. Yun Jae finds himself drawn to Do Hyeon, while Do Hyeon, quiet and reserved, also begins to develop feelings for him.

(Source: QueerDeep YouTube)

View on MyDramaList

item.title: Fan Service (2026)
item.description:
Country: South Korea

Total Episodes: 6

Hallyu star Geon U gradually crumbles under the pressure of endless sasaeng fans and the entertainment industry, and one day he accidentally gets entangled with college student Jae Yeon.

(Source: Korean = filmmakers.co.kr || Translation = MyDramaList)

View on MyDramaList
